title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.540 - Sales by public body to authority, how made
text:
100.540.  Sales by public body to authority, how made. — Any sale, conveyance, lease or agreement provided for in section 100.530 may be made by a public body without appraisal, public notice, advertisement or public bidding.
(L. 1967 p. 172 § 25)
